modal.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
modal.factory_reset_warning: Warning: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history, settings, memory, and temporary skills? This action cannot be undone. The app will restart after cleanup.

settings.title: Settings
settings.daily_routine_desc: Bob automatically runs these tasks each day when your computer wakes up. Memory maintenance runs first, followed by your custom tasks.
settings.daily_routine_hint: Tell Bob in chat: "Add a daily startup task to check my calendar"
settings.daily_routine_guide: You can also tell Bob in chat: "Add a task that runs every day when I open my computer"
settings.workspace_desc: Once configured, bob-agent can browse and read files in this directory.
settings.workspace_placeholder: Click the button to select a directory...
settings.bob_workspace_desc: Configure Bob's core working paths. Set the Wiki directory before first use of the knowledge base.
settings.wiki_dir_desc: Storage location for Wiki files. All ingestion, search, and tool calls point to this directory.
settings.wiki_dir_placeholder: Click the button to select a Wiki directory...
settings.skills_desc: Configure the directory for external skills. The Agent will auto-load them on startup.
settings.skills_placeholder: Click the button to select the external skills directory...
settings.plugin_center_desc: View all registered skills and install advanced engines (e.g., local document parsing) on demand.
settings.mcp_desc: Connect to external tool servers via Model Context Protocol to extend Bob's capabilities.
settings.evolution_desc: Bob's autonomous learning and evolution records.
settings.evo_empty: No evolution records yet. Bob will start learning automatically after conversations.
settings.tracked_folders_desc: Bob remembers the contents of these folders so you can ask about them anytime. You can also drag folders into the chat window to add.
settings.about_desc: AI Desktop Assistant — Chat + Vision + Calendar + File Analysis
settings.custom_model_override_desc: Use this to configure API Keys or providers not in the .env file.
settings.offline_engine_desc: Start the built-in llama-server sidecar to run local GGUF models for offline computation and absolute privacy.
settings.offline_model_placeholder: Please select a local .gguf model file path
settings.api_keys_desc: All keys are stored locally using OS-level encryption (safeStorage) to prevent unauthorized access.
settings.outbox_hint: 💡 Tip: You can also tell Bob directly in the chat 'Help me configure this API Key', or drop a file containing the key into the chat. Bob will automatically recognize and securely configure it.
settings.registry_desc: Edit built-in model provider configurations. Changes override factory defaults and take effect on next startup.
settings.registry_model_visible: Enabled — shown in chat model list
settings.registry_model_hidden: Hidden — won't appear in chat model list
settings.registry_confirm_remove: Remove this provider and all its models?
settings.mobile_assistant_desc: Bind a mobile app to chat with Bob from your phone anytime. Only one channel can be active at a time.
settings.channel_tg_hint: Create a bot using BotFather on Telegram and get your Token. Activating this will disable other channels.
settings.channel_discord_hint: Create an App in Discord Developer Portal and get your Bot Token. Activating this will disable other channels.
settings.wechat_bind_success_desc: WeChat assistant is ready. You can start chatting from your phone.
settings.wechat_scan_hint: Scan with WeChat on your phone
settings.memory_desc: View and manage Bob's knowledge entries and conversation memories.
settings.memory_delete_confirm: Delete this memory entry? This cannot be undone.
settings.show_llama_guide: No local server installed? View Setup Guide
settings.llama_guide_desc: If you need a local LLM, please save llama-server.exe and its .dll dependencies into the program's llm-engine directory.
settings.wiki_migrate_desc: You are changing the knowledge base directory to:
settings.wiki_migrate_mode_merge_desc: Copy files to the new directory. If a file with the same name exists, their contents will be merged intelligently.
settings.wiki_migrate_mode_overwrite_desc: Copy files to the new directory. If a file with the same name exists, it will be directly overwritten.
settings.wiki_migrate_mode_link_desc: Only point to the new directory without copying old files (useful if data is already prepared in the destination).
settings.conn_office_services_desc: Connect office suites so Bob can read and write your calendars, emails, and documents.

chat.global_access_tooltip: When enabled, allows AI to read/modify system files outside the workspace (valid for current chat only)
chat.no_response: (No response from model. Please check API configuration or try again.)
chat.file_path_error: File processing failed: unable to get local file path.
chat.folder_tracked: Folder "{name}" has been added to tracked list.
chat.kb_build_request_cheap: Please use the base model to build a semantic knowledge base for this folder.
chat.kb_build_request_core: Please use the core model to build a semantic knowledge base for this folder.

model_hub.title: Model Hub
model_hub.desc: Automatically discovers available models from .env keys and the model registry. No manual configuration needed.
model_hub.assign_hint_main: Click a model below to set it as Main
model_hub.assign_hint_clerk: Click a model below to set it as Clerk
model_hub.no_models: No models found. Please check your API Key configuration in .env.

kb_estimate.title: KB Construction Estimate
kb_estimate.plan_cheap_desc: Use low-cost models (e.g., GLM-4-Flash, Doubao-lite) for quick summaries. Best for everyday documents.
kb_estimate.plan_core_desc: Use the primary model (e.g., DeepSeek, GPT-4o) for deep understanding. Best for complex code or reports.
kb_estimate.cost_warning: Actual costs depend on document formatting and language. This is an estimate only. Markdown conversion (Phase 3) runs locally and incurs no cost.

inbox.title: Calendar
inbox.empty_cron_hint: Tell Bob in the chat 'Help me broadcast the news every morning at 8 AM' to create one

setup.subtitle: Get started in just 2 steps
setup.ollama_desc: Ollama local model does not require an API Key. Just ensure Ollama is running locally.
setup.get_key_prefix: Get your API Key from the

todo.empty: No to-dos yet. Tell me to add a task!

dream.morning_title: Good morning! Here's your weekly recap
